articles.title: Victor Willis, who co-founded the Village People and co-wrote 'Y.M.C.A.,' dies at 74
articles.content: The cause was identified as “a short but aggressive illness.”. With producer Jacques Morali and Henri Belolo, Morali’s business partner, Willis founded the six-member Village People
articles.summary:
